inputs.name: url
inputs.label: URL Override
inputs.description: Overrides the configured URL at runtime.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Content
outputs.description: Page content as text, Markdown, or HTML depending on the mode setting.

outputs.name: title
outputs.label: Page Title
outputs.description: The <title> element value from the page.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if the page could not be fetched.
